items.claim: Ali's best part of his game is actually his sneaky jab.
items.quote: Ali's best part of his game is actually the jab which is pretty sneaky.

items.claim: Ali is fundamentally a wrestler who didn't need to spam takedowns against Shimrock because he found success on the feet.
items.quote: he's a wrestler. I know he didn't real wrestle against Shimrock... Alf was finding success on the feed anyway.

items.claim: Mike Davis is the better striker in the matchup against Ali.
items.quote: I would argue Davis is the better um striker in the matchup.

items.claim: Mike Davis is better at pure BJJ than Ali.
items.quote: I would argue that Davis like when it comes to the pure BJJ is better too.

items.claim: Once Ali gets top dominant position, he can be very dangerous and good.
items.quote: once he does get top dominant position, he can be very dangerous. He can be very good.

items.claim: Tuchilov is the better fighter between the two debuting at light heavyweight compared to Brenson Rivero.
items.quote: Out of the two guys that are debuting at light heavyweight on this card, I actually do think Tuchilov is the better of the two.

items.claim: Tuchilov knocked out Kaio Mashado, who had a very good run recently.
items.quote: he did knock out Kaio Mashado, who you might think, you know, that's like a not a good win, but Mashado had a very, very good run recently
